CustomField.description: Optional dotted-path expression to extract a value from the success response body into IntegrationDispatcherResult.remoteId or responseBody. Example: $.id pulls top-level id field; $.choices[0].message.content reads OpenAI shape.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: $.id or $.choices[0].message.content style paths. Blank = no extraction.
CustomField.label: Success Parse Expression
